subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the splendours of the Countenance and who hath been inscribed by the Pen of Revelation in the Mother Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الوجه و کان فی ام الالواح من قلم الوحی مسطورا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
